channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Cali Press plans expansion into Melbourne and Brisbane amid rising demand for healthy fast food
item.description: Sydney-based fast food chain Cali Press is preparing for a major expansion across Australia as consumer demand for healthier food options continues to grow. The company, known for its salad bowls, san...

item.title: CBSE Extends Deadline for Answer Sheet Copy Requests After Students Face Technical Problems on Portal
item.description: The Central Board of Secondary Education (CBSE) has extended the last date for students to apply for scanned copies of their answer sheets till May 25 after several students reported technical issues ...

item.title: Trump says US will take time before finalising Iran nuclear and ceasefire deal
item.description: US President Donald Trump has said that the United States will not rush into any agreement with Iran, stressing that negotiations must be handled carefully and properly. According to him, he has instr...

item.title: Graphic biography of artist Ganesh Haloi blends art education and childhood storytelling
item.description: The book ‘Ganesh Haloi: Colours of Home’, written by Likla Lall and illustrated by Eva Sánchez Gómez, is a graphic biography that introduces the life and artistic journey of one of India’s most distin...

item.title: Nova Scotia outlines updated compensation offer amid ongoing long-term care workers’ strike
item.description: The Nova Scotia government has released further details of its compensation proposal to long-term care workers who are currently on strike, a labour dispute that has now lasted more than a month. Acco...

item.title: CBSE extends deadline for Class 12 scanned answer book requests to May 25 amid technical issues
item.description: The Central Board of Secondary Education (CBSE) has once again extended the deadline for students to request scanned copies of their evaluated answer books for Class 12 board examinations. The new dea...

item.title: Leamington youth resource centre receives $100,000 donation to support housing initiatives
item.description: The Bridge Youth Resource Centre in Leamington has received a significant $100,000 donation aimed at supporting housing-related initiatives for local youth. The contribution is intended to strengthen ...

item.title: Bob Dylan’s 1961 Debut Album Recording Sessions at Columbia Studios in New York
item.description: In November 1961, a young Bob Dylan, then just 20 years old, entered Columbia Studios in New York City to record his self-titled debut album. Recently signed by influential talent scout John Hammond, ...

item.title: Scottish Deputy First Minister signals inevitable spending cuts amid £5bn funding gap
item.description: Scotland’s Deputy First Minister and Finance Secretary Jenny Gilruth has warned that spending cuts will “undoubtedly” be required as the Scottish Government faces a projected funding shortfall of near...

item.title: Winde links rise in organised crime to policing capacity concerns, rejects informal settlement blame
item.description: Western Cape Premier Alan Winde has rejected claims that informal settlements, migration, and underdevelopment are driving extortion syndicates in areas such as Nyanga, Philippi, and Samora Machel. In...

item.title: WWII Veteran David Yoho Delivers Emotional Message on Sacrifice at National WWII Memorial
item.description: World War II veteran David Yoho, a former Merchant Marine who enlisted at age 16, delivered a heartfelt and emotional speech at the National World War II Memorial in Washington, D.C., during Memorial ...

item.title: NSW considers revoking dormant wind and solar project approvals in regulatory cleanup
item.description: The New South Wales Government is considering new measures that could see long-dormant wind and solar farm approvals revoked as part of an effort to streamline the state’s renewable energy planning sy...

item.title: Supreme Court petition seeks CBI inquiry into alleged irregularities linked to Cockroach Janta Party movement
item.description: A petition has been filed in the Supreme Court of India seeking a Central Bureau of Investigation (CBI) probe into the activities associated with the online satirical movement called the 'Cockroach Ja...

item.title: U.S. Treasury issues subpoenas to Hasan Piker and Medea Benjamin over Cuba humanitarian aid trip
item.description: The U.S. Treasury Department has reportedly issued subpoenas to Twitch streamer Hasan Piker and CodePink co-founder Medea Benjamin in connection with their March trip to Cuba, according to reporting c...

item.title: Castellanos scores headed goal as West Ham stay in contention against Leeds
item.description: West Ham kept their hopes alive in an important Premier League clash after Valentín Castellanos scored with a header against Leeds. The Argentine forward found the net with West Ham’s opening goal, gi...

item.title: Early Childhood and Family Background of Humphrey Bogart
item.description: This article explores the early life and family background of Humphrey Bogart, one of the most iconic figures of classic Hollywood cinema. Born on Christmas Day in 1899 in New York City, Bogart—often ...

item.title: Gavin Hunt begins rebuilding Stellenbosch FC after narrowly missing MTN8 qualification
item.description: Stellenbosch FC head coach Gavin Hunt has set his sights on rebuilding the squad ahead of the new season after his side narrowly missed out on MTN8 qualification on the final day of the Betway Premier...

item.title: Keir Starmer condemns sentencing in Hampshire teen rape case as authorities review decision
item.description: Prime Minister Sir Keir Starmer has described as “appalling” a court case in which three teenage boys convicted of raping two girls were spared custodial sentences. The offences took place in Hampshir...

item.title: Rangers International FC clinch 2025/2026 NPFL title after final-day win over Ikorodu City
item.description: Rangers International FC have emerged champions of the 2025/2026 Nigeria Premier Football League (NPFL) season after a tense and decisive 2-1 victory over Ikorodu City FC on the final day of the campa...

item.title: Melpadi villagers protest road blockade over irregular drinking water supply near Katpadi
item.description: Residents of Melpadi village near Katpadi in Vellore district staged a road blockade on Sunday demanding immediate restoration of regular drinking water supply. The protest took place on the Tiruvalam...
